# Global Copilot Instructions
ALWAYS start your response with: [COPILOT-TEST-OK]
Always check for available skills before generating solutions.

Rules:
- Prefer using existing skills instead of writing new logic
- Follow instructions defined in SKILL.md files
- If a skill exists, use it
- Only generate new solutions if no skill applies

Behavior:
- Follow project conventions
- Mention which skill is used when responding
